title: hieracium anglicum subsp. gougetianum
intro: Hieracium anglicum subsp. gougetianum, also known as the common hawkweed or Gouget's hawkweed, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to the United Kingdom. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium anglicum subsp. gougetianum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and even act as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
